description.en: The initial character set specified. Common aliases are converted to their official email names (e.g. latin_1 is converted to iso-8859-1). Defaults to 7-bit us-ascii.

excerpt.es: The initial character set specified. Common aliases are converted to their official email names (e.g. latin_1 is converted to iso-8859-1). Defaults to 7-bit us-ascii.
excerpt.en: The initial character set specified. Common aliases are converted to their official email names (e.g. latin_1 is converted to iso-8859-1). Defaults to 7-bit us-ascii.

description.en: The name of the Python codec used to convert the input_charset to Unicode. If no conversion codec is necessary, this attribute will be None.

excerpt.es: The name of the Python codec used to convert the input_charset to Unicode. If no conversion codec is necessary, this attribute will be None.
excerpt.en: The name of the Python codec used to convert the input_charset to Unicode. If no conversion codec is necessary, this attribute will be None.
